title: ChatGPT 5.5 Presentation Prompts
summary: 7 prompts to create complete decks, pitches, scripts, and research presentations.
description: Build complete decks, pitch stories, research presentations, and speaker scripts from a single structured prompt.
tips: Iterate and refine: ask ChatGPT to expand specific slides or change the tone.
Add your personal touch: use the AI-generated content as a foundation, then add your own stories and examples.
Visuals matter: pair these prompts with Images 2.0 to generate custom visuals for your slides.
Practice delivery: use the script prompt to rehearse pacing and emphasis.

prompts.title: Full Presentation Builder
prompts.body:
Act as a world-class presentation creator. Create a complete slide-by-slide presentation about [topic] for [audience].

Include title slide, key points, examples, data, one strong metaphor, visual suggestions, and a closing call-to-action.

Structure it with a TED-style storytelling flow: clear hook, useful insight, and memorable ending.
prompts.note: Best for turning a raw topic into a complete deck structure.

prompts.title: Deep Research Presentation
prompts.body:
Create a research-backed presentation about [topic] for [audience].

Include real statistics, case studies, expert quotes, practical insights, and concrete examples.

Make each slide educational and engaging. Add source references at the end.
prompts.note: Best when credibility and supporting evidence matter.

prompts.title: Simplified Explanation
prompts.body:
Build a beginner-friendly presentation about [topic] for [audience].

Break down complex concepts into simple explanations, analogies, and step-by-step logic.

Make the content clear enough for a complete beginner to understand without prior knowledge.
prompts.note: Best for education, onboarding, and complex topics.

prompts.title: Business Pitch Presentation
prompts.body:
Create a complete investor-style pitch deck for this business idea: [business idea].

Include problem, solution, market size, product features, business model, competitive advantage, financial projections, team slide, and closing pitch script.
prompts.note: Best for startup ideas, internal proposals, and funding decks.

prompts.title: The Storytelling Master
prompts.body:
Create a complete presentation about [topic] using this storytelling structure:

Hook -> Conflict -> Journey -> Insight -> Transformation -> Call to Action.

Make the slides emotional, memorable, and persuasive. Add concise speaker notes with delivery guidance.
prompts.note: Best for persuasive talks and narrative-driven decks.

prompts.title: Corporate Presentation
prompts.body:
Create a formal corporate presentation about [topic] for [company/team/audience].

Include professional tone, structured bullet points, charts, graphs, SWOT analysis, trends, forecasts, and data-backed recommendations.

Make it suitable for boardrooms.
prompts.note: Best for executive, boardroom, and internal strategy contexts.

prompts.title: Complete Presentation + Script Combo
prompts.body:
Create a ready-to-use presentation about [topic] for [audience], and write a complete spoken script I can read while presenting.

Ensure the script matches the tone, pacing, and emotional flow of the slides.

Include pauses, emphasis, storytelling cues, and delivery instructions.
prompts.note: Best when you need both slides and delivery support.

title: Images 2.0 Prompt Library
summary: 15 prompts for characters, mockups, print, icons, storyboards, typography, and visual systems.
description: A structured set of visual prompts with a consistent purpose, prompt text, and example-image placeholder for each item.
tips: Replace bracketed text before copying so the model has concrete subject, style, and content details.
Keep brand-critical details consistent across prompts: character traits, palette, typography, and layout.
Use the image placeholder on each card for a final example, variant, or before/after reference.
For text-heavy outputs, include the self-review line to reduce spelling and anatomy issues.

prompts.title: Generate 8 Poses for the Same Character
prompts.body:
Draw the same character [character description] in 8 different poses/expressions in one image:

1. Smiling 2. Surprised 3. Sad 4. Reading 5. Working on a laptop 6. Drinking coffee 7. On the phone 8. Giving a presentation.

Keep the character design consistent across all 8 versions. Use 2K resolution and a plain background.
prompts.note: Excellent for unifying brand characters or social media accounts.

prompts.title: Character Design from All Angles
prompts.body: Design a character reference sheet for [character description] from 3 angles: front, side, and back. Use [style: anime/3D/cartoon] with a clean plain background.
prompts.note: Locks in the character features so you can reuse the same design from different angles.

prompts.title: High-Precision Text Writing
prompts.body: Create a [design type] and write this exact text: [text]. Use a bold, clear font with perfect spelling and high readability.
prompts.note: Useful for thumbnails, ads, and designs where manual text cleanup would slow you down.

prompts.title: Print Quality 2K
prompts.body: Create a print-ready [poster/brochure/flyer] about [topic], in very high 2K resolution, A4 dimensions, portrait orientation, sharp details, and clean margins.
prompts.note: Append this to poster, flyer, brochure, or one-page design prompts.

prompts.title: Generate Multilingual Designs
prompts.body: Create 3 versions of this [design type] in exactly the same layout: version 1 in [language 1], version 2 in [language 2], and version 3 in [language 3]. Keep spacing, hierarchy, and style consistent.
prompts.note: Ready for publishing the same visual concept across multilingual platforms.

prompts.title: Self-Review Command
prompts.body: After generating the image, self-review [hands/fingers], [faces], and [text spelling]. Correct visible errors before showing the final result.
prompts.note: Add this when hands, readable text, or polish are important.

prompts.title: Legal Design Cloning via Link
prompts.body: Visit [reference link], analyze its visual style, and create a new original image in a similar style using my content: [your content]. Do not copy logos, trademarks, or exact layout.
prompts.note: Use for inspiration and style analysis while keeping the final content specific to your own project.

prompts.title: Professional-Lens Realism
prompts.body: Create a highly realistic photorealistic image of [subject], shot with a 35mm lens, cinematic lighting, sharp focus, natural depth of field, and high-resolution detail.
prompts.note: Best for visuals that should feel like professional photography.

prompts.title: Designing Product Mockups
prompts.body: Place [logo/text] realistically on [product], integrated into the material, lighting, and perspective. Show it in use by [person/context] in a natural lifestyle scene.
prompts.note: Use to showcase products, merch, and branded assets quickly.

prompts.title: Create a Complete Icon Set
prompts.body: Create a cohesive set of 6 icons for [app/topic] in a flat design style. Use only [color 1] and [color 2], consistent stroke/shape language, and a transparent background.
prompts.note: Excellent for app designers and visual identity systems.

prompts.title: Split Screen for Comparisons
prompts.body: Create a split-screen before/after image. Left side: [problem state]. Right side: the same scene after [solution/result]. Keep the composition aligned for easy comparison.
prompts.note: Strong for ads that show a clear problem and solution.

prompts.title: Strict Color Palette Control
prompts.body: Draw [subject/scene] using only this color palette: [color 1], [color 2], [color 3]. Strictly avoid all other colors and keep the palette consistent.
prompts.note: Use to keep campaign visuals aligned with a specific brand palette.

prompts.title: Sequential Image Generation
prompts.body: Using the same character, outfit, and visual style from the previous image, draw the character now [new action/scene]. Keep identity and style consistent.
prompts.note: Perfect for comics, storyboards, and sequential social content.

prompts.title: Structural Infographic Designs
prompts.body: Design an empty, ready-to-fill infographic template about [topic], divided into [number] sequential steps. Use a modern layout and leave clean blank spaces for text.
prompts.note: Use when you want a custom template instead of a stock infographic layout.

prompts.title: Transform a Doodle into a Masterpiece
prompts.body: Take this uploaded sketch, preserve its main structure and composition, and transform it into a high-quality [style] design with polished lighting, depth, and detail.
prompts.note: Upload a rough sketch first, then use this to preserve the idea while upgrading the finish.

title: Animation Style Prompt Library
summary: 11 prompts to reimagine one show, movie, or scene through famous animation and visual styles.
description: Use one source scene and quickly explore it across recognizable animation, collage, 3D, anime, and cinematic treatments.
tips: Replace [show/movie/scene] with a concrete subject, then keep it the same across every style.
Keep core character traits consistent so each result feels like a true reinterpretation, not a new concept.
Use the same aspect ratio across all prompts if you are building a carousel.
Add brand-safe wording when you want inspiration from a style without copying exact characters, logos, or layouts.

prompts.title: Lavish Hand-Drawn Fantasy
prompts.body: Reimagine [show/movie/scene] as a lavish hand-drawn fantasy animation with lush lighting, expressive eyes, painterly backgrounds, dramatic posing, and warm cinematic emotion.
prompts.note: Best for nostalgic fantasy energy, expressive characters, and rich illustrated drama.

prompts.title: Classic Claymation
prompts.body: Reimagine [show/movie/scene] as classic clay stop-motion with handmade clay textures, tiny physical sets, imperfect sculpted details, soft studio lighting, and tactile charm.
prompts.note: Best for cozy handmade scenes that feel crafted frame by frame.

prompts.title: Layered Paper Cut Collage
prompts.body: Reimagine [show/movie/scene] as a 2D paper-cut collage made from layered cut paper, flat shapes, visible paper texture, soft shadows, and a crafted storybook composition.
prompts.note: Best for editorial, handmade, and charming flat-layout visuals.

prompts.title: 1930s Rubber-Hose Cartoon
prompts.body: Reimagine [show/movie/scene] as a 1930s rubber-hose cartoon with black-and-white ink lines, bendy limbs, vintage character posing, theatrical expressions, and old animation charm.
prompts.note: Best for retro cartoon energy with playful exaggeration.

prompts.title: Nostalgic Holiday Stop-Motion
prompts.body: Reimagine [show/movie/scene] as nostalgic stop-motion with cozy miniature sets, slightly janky character puppets, warm holiday lighting, soft textures, and storybook staging.
prompts.note: Best for warm, odd, handcrafted scenes with a vintage TV-special feel.

prompts.title: Yellow Sitcom Cartoon
prompts.body: Reimagine [show/movie/scene] as a classic yellow-skin satirical sitcom cartoon with bold outlines, flat colors, expressive crowd staging, simple backgrounds, and comedic visual timing.
prompts.note: Best for instantly readable parody-style scenes and ensemble casts.

prompts.title: Polished 3D Animated Feature
prompts.body: Reimagine [show/movie/scene] as a polished 3D animated feature with warm lighting, expressive faces, impeccable shot composition, soft materials, and cinematic depth.
prompts.note: Best for clean, emotional, family-film-style visual storytelling.

prompts.title: Deliberately Bad MS Paint
prompts.body: Reimagine [show/movie/scene] as deliberately crude MS Paint art with simple brush lines, flat fills, awkward anatomy, uneven shapes, and charming low-effort computer-drawing energy.
prompts.note: Best for humor, memes, and intentionally rough visual contrast.

prompts.title: Chaotic Adult Sci-Fi Cartoon
prompts.body: Reimagine [show/movie/scene] as a chaotic adult sci-fi cartoon with sharp outlines, exaggerated expressions, surreal props, strange background details, and irreverent animated energy.
prompts.note: Best for absurd sci-fi reinterpretations and comedic weirdness.

prompts.title: 1970s Japanese Anime Movie
prompts.body: Reimagine [show/movie/scene] as a classic 1970s Japanese anime movie with dramatic lighting, painted backgrounds, expressive eyes, cinematic framing, and vintage film texture.
prompts.note: Best for emotional, cinematic scenes with retro anime atmosphere.

prompts.title: Green-Tinted Cyberpunk Matrix
prompts.body: Reimagine [show/movie/scene] as a green-tinted cyberpunk action film with leather outfits, digital rain atmosphere, fluorescent lighting, slow-motion tension, and hacker-movie mood.
prompts.note: Best for dark cinematic action, tech-noir mood, and dramatic reinventions.

title: Nostalgia Photo Prompt Templates
summary: 12 prompts for VHS, Polaroid, Y2K, CRT, PS1, pixel art, tabloid, sepia, and retro image styles.
description: Transform an uploaded identity reference into nostalgic photo, video, game, print, and animation aesthetics with editable scene variables.
tips: Upload a clear face reference first so the prompt can preserve identity across styles.
Fill in role, scene, action, outfit, extra details, and mood before copying.
Keep the scene simple when using low-resolution formats so the final image stays readable.
Use the same role and outfit across multiple prompts to create a cohesive nostalgic carousel.

prompts.title: VHS Home Video
prompts.body: Use the uploaded photo as the face and identity reference. Turn this person into [ROLE] captured on a 1990s home video in [SCENE]. They are [ACTION], framed casually as if someone nearby recorded the moment without planning it. Keep the person recognizable, but adapt their outfit to [OUTFIT]. Add [EXTRA DETAILS]. Make it feel like a VHS handycam still, with analog blur, scan lines, tape noise, color bleed, muted colors, low resolution, and imperfect handheld framing. Mood, [MOOD].
prompts.note: Best for 1990s home-video stills with tape noise and imperfect handheld framing.

prompts.title: Polaroid Instant Photo
prompts.body: Use the uploaded photo as the identity reference. Reimagine this person as [ROLE] in [SCENE], captured in a single vintage instant photo. They are [ACTION], posed naturally but not too perfectly. Keep their likeness clear, change the clothing to [OUTFIT], and include [EXTRA DETAILS]. Make the image feel like an old Polaroid, with soft focus, faded tones, gentle flash, creamy highlights, instant film texture, and slight color aging. Mood, [MOOD].
prompts.note: Best for warm instant-film portraits with faded tones and soft nostalgic texture.

prompts.title: Y2K Digital Camera
prompts.body: Use the uploaded photo as the identity reference. Create a mid-2000s digital snapshot of this person as [ROLE] at [SCENE]. They are [ACTION], caught with casual flash-camera energy, like a photo taken for an old social album. Keep their face and recognizable features consistent. Dress them in [OUTFIT] and add [EXTRA DETAILS]. Use harsh direct flash, shiny highlights, slight red-eye risk, low-res digital noise, overexposed skin, and compact camera sharpness. Mood, [MOOD].
prompts.note: Best for mid-2000s party snapshots, old social albums, and direct flash energy.

prompts.title: Cinematic Film Grain
prompts.body: Use the uploaded photo as the actor reference. Cast this person as [ROLE] in a cinematic scene set in [SCENE]. They are [ACTION], lit like a still from an analog feature film. Keep the person recognizable while adapting their wardrobe to [OUTFIT]. Add [EXTRA DETAILS]. Use natural film grain, soft highlight rolloff, rich shadows, subtle lens softness, realistic color grading, and an emotional movie-still atmosphere. Mood, [MOOD].
prompts.note: Best for emotional analog movie stills with rich shadows and realistic film texture.

prompts.title: CRT TV Screen
prompts.body: Use the uploaded photo as the identity reference. Make this person appear as [ROLE] inside a scene playing on an old CRT television. The scene is [SCENE], and they are [ACTION]. Keep their likeness visible through the screen distortion. Dress them in [OUTFIT] and include [EXTRA DETAILS]. Render it as a paused retro TV image, with scan lines, phosphor glow, rounded screen curvature, bloom, slight static, softened detail, and analog display distortion. Mood, [MOOD].
prompts.note: Best for paused retro television frames with scan lines, glow, and curved screen distortion.

prompts.title: PS1 Graphics
prompts.body: Use the uploaded photo as the character identity reference. Recreate this person as a PS1-era game character, a [ROLE] in [SCENE]. They are [ACTION], designed like a playable character or cutscene model. Keep their likeness recognizable through low-poly facial structure and key features. Give them [OUTFIT] and include [EXTRA DETAILS]. Use low-polygon geometry, crunchy textures, limited lighting, jagged edges, warped surfaces, and late-1990s 3D game atmosphere. Mood, [MOOD].
prompts.note: Best for late-1990s game characters with low-poly geometry and crunchy textures.

prompts.title: Low-Res Monochrome Handheld Camera
prompts.body:
Use the uploaded photo as the face and identity reference. Turn this person into [ROLE] in [SCENE], [ACTION], as if photographed with an old monochrome handheld camera. Keep the person recognizable, but reduce the image aggressively to match the device's limitations. Adapt the outfit to [OUTFIT] and add [EXTRA DETAILS] only in very simple readable shapes.

Make it look like a true low-resolution handheld camera image, with tiny resolution, only 4 greenish tones, strong dithering, coarse dot patterns, heavy pixelation, simplified shadows, and a raw monochrome portable-camera look. The final result should feel ugly, limited, and graphic, not polished pixel art, not smooth digital art, and not a modern retro illustration. Mood, [MOOD].
prompts.note: Best for harsh monochrome portable-camera looks with dithering and tiny resolution.

prompts.title: Classic Disney Animation
prompts.body: Use the uploaded photo as the identity reference. Reimagine this person as [ROLE] in [SCENE], drawn as a classic hand-painted animated character. They are [ACTION], with expressive body language and a clear storybook pose. Keep their recognizable face, features, and personality, but translate them into traditional animation design. Dress them in [OUTFIT] and add [EXTRA DETAILS]. Use clean linework, soft painted backgrounds, warm color styling, gentle shading, and timeless animated film charm. Mood, [MOOD].
prompts.note: Best for classic hand-painted animation with warm storybook charm.

prompts.title: MySpace Profile Pic
prompts.body: Use the uploaded photo as the identity reference. Turn this person into [ROLE] taking a mid-2000s MySpace profile picture in [SCENE]. They are [ACTION], with an intentionally casual, slightly awkward social-media pose. Keep their face and recognizable features consistent. Style them with [OUTFIT] and include [EXTRA DETAILS]. Use direct flash, blown highlights, strong contrast, low-res digital quality, messy framing, nostalgic profile-photo energy, and early internet attitude. Mood, [MOOD].
prompts.note: Best for early internet profile-photo energy with messy framing and direct flash.

prompts.title: Magazine Scan, Tabloid Gossip Style
prompts.body:
Use the uploaded photo as the subject reference. Turn this person into [ROLE] featured inside a crowded tabloid gossip magazine page about [SCANDAL OR STORY]. Keep their likeness recognizable, but make the final image feel like a chaotic printed celebrity gossip spread, not a clean editorial portrait. Place them in [SCENE], [ACTION], wearing [OUTFIT], surrounded by loud headlines, cropped paparazzi-style photos, arrows, circles, stickers, price tags, captions, gossip callouts, and messy page graphics.

Make it look like a real scanned tabloid magazine page, with cheap glossy paper texture, halftone dots, saturated ink, slightly faded print, scanner softness, compression artifacts, overlapping text boxes, dramatic pull quotes, red circles, yellow labels, and cluttered layout energy. The page should feel noisy, sensational, and overdesigned, like a 2000s supermarket gossip magazine. Mood, [MOOD].
prompts.note: Best for chaotic 2000s celebrity gossip spreads with headlines, arrows, and scan texture.

prompts.title: 1980s Pixel Art
prompts.body: Use the uploaded photo as the character reference. Transform this person into [ROLE] in [SCENE], shown [ACTION] like a scene from an 1980s fantasy or arcade game. Keep their identity recognizable through simplified facial features, silhouette, and expression. Give them [OUTFIT] and include [EXTRA DETAILS]. Render it as authentic 1980s pixel art, with a limited color palette, crisp blocky pixels, simplified forms, minimal shading, and old-school game-screen composition. Mood, [MOOD].
prompts.note: Best for old-school arcade or fantasy scenes with crisp blocky pixels.

prompts.title: Vintage Sepia
prompts.body:
Use the uploaded photo as the identity reference. Recreate this person as [ROLE] in an old sepia photograph set in [SCENE]. They are [ACTION], posed like a formal or candid photo from the late 1800s or early 1900s. Keep their face and recognizable features consistent, but adapt their outfit to [OUTFIT] and add [EXTRA DETAILS] that feel historically aged and natural.

Make the image look like a true vintage sepia photograph, with warm brown monochrome tones, faded contrast, soft focus, subtle scratches, paper stains, worn edges, gentle vignette, uneven exposure, and old photographic texture. Avoid modern sharpness, bright colors, clean digital skin, or glossy AI polish. Mood, [MOOD].
prompts.note: Best for late-1800s or early-1900s sepia photos with worn paper texture.

title: ChatGPT Superman Mode Prompts
summary: 8 prompts for accelerated learning, strategic thinking, clarity, leverage, and self-mastery.
description: A compact prompt library for compressing learning, improving mental systems, creating leverage, and making sharper decisions.
tips: Replace bracketed fields with specific context before copying the prompt.
Use one prompt at a time so the response can go deeper instead of staying generic.
Ask ChatGPT to turn the first answer into a weekly plan, checklist, or daily routine.
Save the strongest outputs and reuse them as personal operating rules.

prompts.title: Advanced Learning Mode
prompts.body:
Pretend you are a cognitively advanced mentor. I want to master any complex skill at above-average speed.

Build a weekly learning plan based on spaced repetition, interleaving, simplified explanations, and active recall.

Apply this plan to [insert topic]. The goal is top 1% excellence within 90 days.
prompts.note: Best for turning a hard skill into a structured 90-day learning system.

prompts.title: Expert-Level Knowledge
prompts.body:
Act as the absolute authority in [insert field]. Guide me like a direct apprentice, from fundamentals to full mastery.

Build the path in clear stages with practice tasks, little-known resources, and faster routes.

Include applied exercises, simulations, or real challenges so every stage is truly absorbed.
prompts.note: Best for mapping the path from beginner to advanced execution in a field.

prompts.title: Upgrade Your Mental System
prompts.body:
Act as a mental architect. Analyze my current operating patterns: thought patterns, habits, and beliefs.

Rebuild my internal system to increase mental clarity, accelerate decision-making, strengthen memory, spark creativity, and improve emotional control.
prompts.note: Best for diagnosing current habits and rebuilding a stronger personal operating system.

prompts.title: High-Performance Thinking
prompts.body:
Play the role of a strategic mentor inspired by leaders such as Elon Musk and Jeff Bezos.

Reshape my thinking process to prioritize systems reasoning, long-term vision, intelligent leverage, and asymmetric outcomes.

Give me daily mental models that help me evolve from ordinary thinking to an exceptional level.
prompts.note: Best for upgrading how you reason through goals, systems, and high-leverage decisions.

prompts.title: Turn Years Into Days
prompts.body:
Act as a time-leverage expert. I want to accomplish in 1 year what most people need 10 years to achieve.

Based on my goal, create a high-impact plan that uses smart shortcuts, advanced tools, strategic delegation, automation, and AI to radically accelerate results and create a clear advantage.
prompts.note: Best for finding tools, shortcuts, and leverage points around a specific goal.

prompts.title: Become Your Best Version
prompts.body:
Act as a psychological reconstruction expert. Help me dismantle limiting identity patterns and build a new functional self-image.

Redefine how I think, act, and make decisions so they fully align with my ideal self.
prompts.note: Best for translating an ideal identity into practical behavior and decisions.

prompts.title: Build Absolute Clarity
prompts.body:
Act as a mental clarity strategist. Help me eliminate noise, false urgency, and passive decision-making.

Create a simple system for thinking clearly, setting the right priorities, and focusing on what truly drives results.
prompts.note: Best for stripping away distraction and building a clearer priority system.

prompts.title: Design a High-Impact Life
prompts.body:
Act as a strategic life architect. Based on my values, skills, and ambitions, map an intentional life plan.

The goal is to maximize long-term impact, freedom, and alignment while avoiding distraction and random choices.
prompts.note: Best for connecting values, ambition, skills, and practical direction.

title: Higgsfield Prompts
summary: 8 Higgsfield prompts for restoration, retouching, cleanup, headshots, selfies, upscaling, anime, and product ads.
description: A focused Higgsfield prompt library for image repair, identity-preserving edits, lifestyle shots, style conversion, and polished commercial visuals.
tips: Upload the clearest possible reference image before using identity-preserving prompts.
Keep requested changes specific so the model can preserve the untouched parts of the image.
Use the numbered examples as visual references for the intended before-and-after result.
For edits involving text, labels, or logos, explicitly state what must remain unchanged.

prompts.title: 1. Photo Restoration
prompts.body: Bring this aged photograph back to life using period-appropriate restoration. Identify when it was taken and which photographic process produced it so the rebuild stays historically faithful. Tighten blurred contours, ease out grain, and fill lost regions with textures native to the original. Reintroduce missing color in a measured, era-appropriate way – never neon, never plastic. Re-balance whites, blacks, and skin tones for natural lighting; lift shadows and tame highlights without flattening the image. Quietly reconstruct eroded detail – fabric weave, skin pores, distant scenery – while leaving the framing untouched. Keep gentle film grain for character, strip artefacts but preserve the era's soft exposure profile. Finally, upscale to a clean modern resolution so the result reads as a freshly developed photograph rather than a digital effect.
prompts.note: Best for historically faithful restoration of aged or damaged photographs.

prompts.title: 2. Body Reshape
prompts.body: Recompose the body in this image to match [TARGET BUILD – e.g. lean and athletic, slimmer waist, longer legs, more muscular, softer figure, etc.]. Preserve believable anatomy and proportion, keep skin tone and surface texture consistent with the original, and let the lighting on the new body match the lighting that was already on the rest of the scene. The retouch must read as one continuous photograph – no warped surroundings, no smeared edges, no cut-out feel – just the same person in the same shot with their physique adjusted.
prompts.note: Best for realistic physique adjustments that preserve the original photo context.
variables: TARGET BUILD – e.g. lean and athletic, slimmer waist, longer legs, more muscular, softer figure, etc.

prompts.title: 3. Remove Watermarks
prompts.body: Treat the underlying photo as untouchable and strip away only the overlaid logos, captions, or graphic marks sitting on top of it. The recovered image must remain identical beneath – no redrawn faces, no altered hair or skin, no shifted expression, no rearranged limbs, no new background. Just the source photo, cleanly free of overlays.
prompts.note: Best for removing visible overlays while keeping the original image unchanged.

prompts.title: 4. Professional Portrait
prompts.body: Take the casual reference photo and rebuild it as a polished executive-grade headshot. Reframe to head-and-shoulders against a clean seamless studio backdrop, swap whatever the subject is wearing for a sharp tailored suit, crisp dress shirt, and a subtle tie. Direct the gaze straight into the lens with a confident closed-mouth smile and an upright squared posture. Light it like a high-end studio: a large soft key from above camera-left, gentle fill, a quiet rim to separate them from the backdrop, with clean catchlights in both eyes. Hold an 85mm portrait look with the backdrop softly out of focus. Preserve real skin texture – pores, fine lines, age – without plastic smoothing. Keep the original face identity, age, ethnicity, hair, and beard intact; only the wardrobe, framing, lighting, and backdrop change.
prompts.note: Best for turning casual references into polished professional headshots.

prompts.title: 5. Famous Selfie
prompts.body: Casual phone selfie shot, both subjects from the reference images crowded close together at the lens, leaning into the frame from each side, holding the phone at arm's length with a slight upward tilt. Easy shoulder-to-shoulder framing, eyes straight into the camera, relaxed everyday expressions. Soft mixed indoor light cutting against direct phone-flash, with mild blown highlights and natural shadow falloff on the faces. Skin reads real – visible pore detail, faint pore-level texture, subtle makeup if any, the odd flyaway hair, minor fabric crease. The setting sits softly behind them, slightly out of focus, with everyday environmental detail still readable. A touch of edge motion blur from a moving hand, gentle lens distortion from how close the phone is, off-center crop, hint of ISO grain, white balance not perfectly clean. Unfiltered, unposed, candid realism – looks like a quick phone snap, not a styled portrait.
prompts.note: Best for candid two-person phone selfies with unpolished realism.

prompts.title: 6. 4K Enhancer
prompts.body: High-resolution upscale anchored to the source – zero deviation in face, identity, expression, pose, framing, and scene. Recover natural detail (pores, hair, fabric) without stylization. Keep colors, lighting, and contrast exact. Strip compression artifacts and noise while preserving authentic texture – no smoothing, no plastic skin, no identity drift, no hallucinated detail. Output: a photorealistic upscale – only clearer and sharper.
prompts.note: Best for sharper source-faithful upscales without identity drift.

prompts.title: 7. Product Ad
prompts.body: Premium product ad composition: isolate the product from the reference and rebuild it as a hero shot – centered, sharply in focus, surrounded by its key flavor ingredients arranged with depth and intent. Mix whole and sliced fruits, herb sprigs or botanicals, and crushed ice where it fits the product. Composition balanced but not perfectly symmetrical. Wet surface with subtle reflections, scattered droplets, and micro-condensation on the product. Background tone gradient tuned to match the label's color palette and mood. High-end studio lighting with controlled edge highlights and soft shadow falloff grounding the product. Crisp edges, fine detail in condensation, pulp, leaf veins, and ice crystals. Minimal negative space, no clutter, polished commercial finish that still feels real. Preserve the product's design, label text, logo, proportions, and packaging exactly as in the reference.
prompts.note: Best for premium commercial product hero shots from a reference image.

prompts.title: 8. Anime Effect
prompts.body: Convert the reference image into a polished hand-drawn anime rendering, keeping composition, camera angle, framing, pose, and proportions exactly intact. Translate facial structure and expression faithfully into anime style – large expressive eyes following the original gaze, simplified clean nose and mouth, charming character appeal. Crisp linework with subtle weight variation. Reinterpret hair into defined anime strands while preserving original shape, color, and flow. Skin shaded smoothly with soft tonal gradients. Carry over lighting direction and intensity from the source. Palette lightly stylized but true to the original. Background reworked into a matching anime environment with the same depth and perspective. Gentle cel shading. No anatomy or perspective distortion, no crop change – a high-fidelity anime adaptation of the original.
prompts.note: Best for anime conversion while preserving framing, pose, and identity.
